title: endiandra oblonga
intro: Endiandra oblonga, a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, is native to Australia and New Guinea, and is also known as the 'Queensland walnut'. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Endiandra oblonga include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Endiandra oblonga include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
